body.title: Wire reactive listener: TWM goal_ready → PROC_CODING_SPRINT
body.result: step=4 re-emits GOAL_READY when TWM empty (post-restart recovery). Listener+habit were already correctly wired; real gap was TWM cleared on restart with no re-push. 37-line fix in goal_continuation.py + 3 new tests. e67e9d8a, 15/15 tests pass. Scaffold for future T-anticipation-primitive.
body.description:
goal_continuation posts [GOAL READY] and pushes a TWM entry with category='goal_ready' (10-min TTL), expecting PROC_CODING_SPRINT to fire reactively. But PROC_CODING_SPRINT is only bound to explicit phrases in basal_ganglia's phrase->procedure map — no listener turns fresh goal_ready signals into automatic sprints. Observed 2026-04-22: T-audit-findings-to-tickets stuck at step 4 for 60+ minutes with no progress, TWM entry expired silently.

First scaffold for the 'want = anticipation' design direction (see memory/project_missing_want_primitive.md). For now, deterministic: fresh goal_ready in TWM -> fire PROC_CODING_SPRINT with the ticket id. Future refinement: anticipatory selection among multiple ready goals based on predicted valence-delta.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step in sprint. Likely a new module cognition/goal_ready_listener.py + a wire-point in an existing periodic loop (daemon_supervisor, basal_ganglia tick, or equivalent). TWM writer (cortex.twm_push) stays untouched.
**Design rules:** oop-first (Listener class), docs-in-code (operating contract in module docstring), test-plan-or-why-not (see below).
**Scope boundary:** IN — reactive listener scanning TWM for category='goal_ready' entries, dedup of already-handled entries, fire PROC_CODING_SPRINT with ticket id. OUT — fixing PROC_CODING_SPRINT itself, widening TTL, goal_continuation mechanical step improvements, anticipation-as-primary-driver work.
**Test plan:** (a) unit: Listener.scan_twm() returns fresh goal_ready entries; dedup by id/timestamp. (b) integration: push a goal_ready TWM entry -> PROC_CODING_SPRINT invoked within 30s. (c) regression: existing goal_continuation tests still pass.
**Inertia check:** new module LOW. Wire-point likely MEDIUM (daemon_supervisor or basal_ganglia). Will surface the specific file before edit if it lands in MEDIUM+ territory.
